articles.author: Associated Press
articles.title: PGA Tour, DPWT announce alliance with Asian Tour, dealing blow to LIV Golf - Golf Channel
articles.description: LIV Golf suffered a potential setback Tuesday when the PGA Tour, DP World Tour and Asian Tour announced a strategic alliance.
articles.content: LIV Golf suffered a potential setback Tuesday when the PGA Tour, DP World Tour and Asian Tour announced a strategic alliance aimed at global collaboration that is likely to affect the partnership the… [+3832 chars]
